title: Cognitive Landscape Research Programme (CLRP)
description: Implementation-independent foundation for research on cognitive diversity as a continuous landscape. Includes CLRP specifications, validation status reports, governance, and citation metadata. Documentation licensed CC BY 4.0.
notes: Enable GitHub integration at https://zenodo.org/account/settings/github/ and toggle ON for SynapticFour/cognitive-landscape-research-programme. Each GitHub Release (clrp-v*) is archived automatically. See docs/zenodo-integration.md.
